description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Debian build that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a matrix of jobs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a Debian container, varying by distribution (bookworm, trixie), compiler (clang, gcc, clang-15, clang-17, gcc-14), and packages. For each job, install git, check out the repository with submodules, install dependencies via a script, and then build the project using another script.
